transformation.title: Intelligent CSR Chat Evolution
transformation.description: Transform CSR Chat (Minerva) from a single-purpose support tool into an intelligent, self-adapting customer service copilot that autonomously optimizes performance, expands coverage, and enhances agent capabilities. Drive strategic business value through sub-15 second response times, comprehensive plan intelligence, and premium agent experiences that scale seamlessly across the enterprise while continuously learning and improving operational excellence.

quarters.description: Performance infrastructure + Plan Expansion + Enhanced UX
Formulary Integration + Agent Experience + Full Plan Expansion

features.name: Increase Concurrent Requests
features.description:
• Increase threshold for concurrent requests per minute
  • Support scaling across all contact center agents and lines-of-business
  • Reduce error rate and timeout events to zero or near zero

features.name: Performance Evaluation & Improvement
features.description:
• Evaluate opportunities to improve performance
  • Reduce response times to sub 15 seconds (63%)
  • Maintin 98% accuracy
  • Maintain 40 rpm concurrency

features.name: 🤝 Phase 2 Alignment
features.description:
HyperCare Live Issue Log
  • ID:19 Increase Concurrency / Eliminate timeouts
  • ID:20 Latency exceeds 15 second requirement
    • UX Focus Group
  • Agents can't predict latency; compensates by switching tools
  • Generic errors stop task completion.

cards.title: 📈 Comprehensive Plan Data Platform
cards.scope: Expand EOC coverage to Large Group and Custom plan types

features.name: Support Plan Expansion
features.description:
• Complete onboarding of Individual/Family Plans (IFP) and Small Group (SG)
  • Expand plan support to Large Group (LG), and Custom plan types
  • Ongoing support for validating and enhancing prompt and script logic

features.name: Prototype AI Validation with Self-Adapting Intelligence
features.description:
• Prototype intelligent Discovery, Verification, and Self-Adapting processes
  • Automatic plan data inconsistency detection
  • Human-In-The-Loop verification and correction validation
  • Continuous quality improvements
  • Maintaining >98% data accuracy while reducing manual intervention by 50%

features.name: 🤝 Phase 2 Alignment
features.description:
HyperCare Live Issue Log
  • ID:36 Large group minerva responses are not accurate where the response should match Phase 1
    • Phase 2 Scope (Multiple Sources)
  • Expand data corpus (2700+ IFP/SG/LG/Custom plans)
  • Plan Year / Annual Changes

cards.title: 📊 Product Performance Analytics
cards.target: Insights Across Product and Agent Performance

features.name: Performance Dashboard
features.description:
• Build a secure, role-based analytics dashboard
  • Provide real-time and historic visibility into performance, adoption, quality, and feedback

features.name: Enhance Plan Delta Monitoring
features.description:
• Establish measurements for plan data changes
  • Real-time tracking of change frequency, significance, and quality degredation
  • Notifications of significant change events

features.name: Request-Response Report
features.description:
• Execute a daily extract of all Request-Response data
  • Extract of all Feedback

features.name: 🤝 Phase 2 Alignment
features.description:
HyperCare Live Issue Log
  • ID:17 Minerva AI Reporting (MVP Scope)
    • Phase 2/3 Scope (Multiple Sources)
  • Plan Year / Annual Changes (visualize delta)

cards.title: 🎨 Enhanced Agent Experience
cards.target: Improved user experience and workflow efficiency

features.name: Establish New CSR Chat Experience
features.description:
• Release no-code/low-code user interface
  • Contextual panel and configurable architecture
  • Seamless integration into existing agent workflows

features.name: Customer Application Integration
features.description:
• Reduces workflow disruption through in-context information display
  • Eliminates need for full-screen transitions
  • Maintains agent focus on customer interactions

features.name: Increased Agent Confidence
features.description:
• Real-time guidance capabilities
  • Progress indicators to reduce confusion
  • Proactive error prevention
  • Automated quality checks
  • Contextual help reducing parsing time

features.name: 🤝 Phase 2 Alignment
